text:
[SHEET: RFP ODDO BHF]
Unnamed: 0 Unnamed: 1 Unnamed: 2 Unnamed: 3 Unnamed: 4 Unnamed: 5
 
 Procurement REF: 14_2025 
 Job Title IT Project Manager 
 Job Title's Detail Project Manager Encryption 
 Department IT Infrastructure & IT Operations 
 
 
 Company Name 
 Identifier of profile 
 Answer date 
 Nb years of experience\nexcl intershipts / etc 
 
 Answer established with the candidate 
 Reason for the termination of the last experience 
 Feedback/reference of previous client 
 
 Freelance / Employee 
 If freelance, how many years have you (the company) worked with the freelance ? 
 Daily rate( €/d excl. taxes) 
 
 
 Context The IT dept of ODDO BHF is currenlty delivering DORA regulatory project with a major stream related to Encryption.\n\nWe are searching for a project manager to \n- Define and Steer the defined actions plan.\n- Manage a RFP regarding tooling KMS, PKI, HSM & CLM.\n- Organize & follow the deployment of target Encyption tools, chosen during the RFP.\n- Contribute to the update of technical procedures with internal skill teams\n- Manage the synchronization between the different teams and follow-up and report on progress\n\nYou will integrate this project and will represent the DORA "Encryption" stream as a member of IT Cybersecurity in all committees. You will have to ensure the good delivery of regulatory requirements in the project.\n\nYou will strongly collaborate with different IT Teams (IT Cybersecurity, IT Operations, IT Development, IT Business Vertical), as well as the 2nd line of defense IRM. 
 Matching assessment
 Background Profile experience must meet the minimal requirements: Input a value from 0 (min) to 3 (max)
 The Group's IT teams are made up of more than 600 employees spread across Paris, Tunis, Frankfurt and Düsseldorf. 0..3
 We are looking for a project manager with a significant experience (more than 8 years) in the coordination of IT projects involving technical experts in a regulatory context. 0..3
 Knowledge in Encryption (certificates & keys) 0..3
 IT Infrastructure & security knowledge 0..3
 
 Detailed roles Expectations Matching assessment
 Project activity 
 Coordinate, challenge, organize and manage IT teams involved in the project 0..3
 Animate meetings and committees with project teams and management 0..3
 Draft reportingt for project & steering committee 0..3
 Establish & manage the budget associated to the project 0..3
 
 Manage the communication and the reporting to committees 0..3
 Keep traceability of all meeting decisions via minutes 0..3
 
 Education Bac +5 graduated mandatory input the name and year of graduation
 
 Expected skills Knowledge foundation 
 Solid technical background in infrastructure technologies & in Security Topics (encryption) 0..3
 
 Skills foundation 
 English proficiency 0..3
 Project management methodology 0..3
 Budget construction 0..3
 People management 0..3
 
 Mindset foundation 
 Good communication skills (fluent in English and French, written and spoken) 0..3
 Diplomacy, flexibility, Power of persuasion, Intellectual curiosity 0..3
 Highly skilled in oral and written communication 0..3
 team oriented 0..3
 
 Optional bonus criterias 
 DORA Regulations 0..3
 Technical knowledge of encryption 0..3
 Excellent project management skills high cultural context 0..3
 
 Estimated duration of the mission One to one and half years 
 
 Start date Asap input the estimated starting date
 
 
 Workplace\n- \nRemote work 3d / week Rue du General Leclerc, Clichy la Garenne 
 Remote working 2d/week in average 
 
 International business travel supported by Oddo, average stays of 2-3 days: 
 · Germany: Frankfurt 1 or 2 times at the beginning to meet the team) 
 · Tunisia : Tunis (1 or 2 times at the beginning to meet the team)

tasks: Mettre à jour les procédures techniques
Gérer la synchronisation entre les équipes
Représenter le projet (stream DORA Encryption) dans les comités
Assurer la livraison des exigences réglementaires
Rédiger les rapports de projet et de comité de pilotage
Maintenir la traçabilité des décisions de réunion
